/usr/bin/g++ --coverage -pedantic -O3 -g -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Vrptw.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Vrptw.dir/src/LabelingAlgorithm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Vrptw.dir/src/VrpTW_DecompLabeling.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Vrptw.dir/src/VrpTW_Decomp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Vrptw.dir/src/Instancia.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Vrptw.dir/src/SolomonInst.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Vrptw.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o Vrptw   -L/home/igor/gurobi1000/linux64/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/igor/gurobi1000/linux64/lib -lDwDecomp -lgurobi_c++ -lgurobi -lGrafo
